# <(_:_:)

**Operator**

Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the value of the first argument is less than that of the second argument.

## Declaration

```swift
static func < (lhs: SafariSettings.CookiePolicy, rhs: SafariSettings.CookiePolicy) -> Bool
```
